title: Matching Moodle question
instructions: Match each prompt/left-side item to the best visible dropdown option.
Return one action for every select control. Each action must use the select control slotIndex and the exact dropdown option label.
Do not put 'prompt: answer' pairs in action.label. action.label must be only the option label, for example 'Вольт'.
Every label listed in the control options is available even if it is not currently selected or not visible in the collapsed dropdown.
Consider all options for each row before answering. If the task implies one-to-one matching, avoid repeating the same option unless it is clearly correct.
The human-readable answer may show pairs, but actions are what the extension applies.
